name: AppStore Discount Tracker
description:
Monitors App Store app prices and reminds you in the timeline when prices drop below your configured original price.

Per-app config: for each app ID listed in apps, manually add config keys (replace {appId} with the App Store ID):
  {appId}_region — two-letter store region, e.g. 6751482006_region = us
  {appId}_original_price — reference/regular price, e.g. 6751482006_original_price = 19.99
author: Sidefy Team

apps.description: App Store app IDs to monitor, comma-separated. Example: 6751482006,9876543210

default_region.description: Default store region when {appId}_region is not set. Example: us, cn, jp
